block_frame_transform.description: Left robot base frame transformation from block frame origin
Center robot base frame transformation from block frame origin
Right robot base frame transformation from block frame origin

workspace.description: Common workspace parameters for all robots - table top is at 0.159m in robot frame

block_frame_origin.description: Block frame origin (0,0,0) is at the center of the workspace table
block_frame_origin.x_positive: Rightward when looking from front of table

robot_base_frames.description: Robot base frames are positioned around the workspace table
robot_base_frames.left_robot: 40cm to the left of block frame origin, 11cm back from origin
robot_base_frames.center_robot: Directly behind block frame origin, 11cm back from origin
robot_base_frames.right_robot: 40cm to the right of block frame origin, 11cm back from origin

coordinate_transformations.description: Coordinate system relationships based on URDF analysis

right_arm.transformation: Block frame is at x=11cm, y=-40cm in right robot frame
right_arm.x_mapping: +X robot = -Y block (rightward in robot frame = leftward in block frame)
right_arm.y_mapping: +Y robot = +X block (forward in robot frame = forward in block frame)
